type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The test is done once a year and extrapolated across the year.  As a result there is significant variation in year on year data.  Additionally the test performed does not differentiate PM2.5 vs PM 10, as a result the decision was made historically to report all measured particulate as PM 2.5.  To be consistent, this will continue until differentiation can be achieved.
